title: fix formatting for the latest changelog block

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

@sanga TYVM for the change.  The CI that we use requires that we sign any PR's which you neglected to do.  As that line really should be removed anyway, I've created #2092 to take care of that and I'll close this PR out.
